video_title: Guy Fieri Eats a Brisket Melt | Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives | Food Network

restaurants.name: The Butcher Shop
restaurants.guy_intro: Hunter and I are hanging out, triple D, at a place called The Butcher Shop, a father-son joint. These guys have got a full-blown butcher shop, the real deal, a restaurant, and a beer garden. As soon as you walk into the door, you're already in a great mood, before you even tasted the food.

dishes.description: Smoked brisket served on Texas toast with cheese, brisket jus, house barbecue sauce, and caramelized onions.
dishes.guy_response: Oh, my gosh. Mm. Love the smoke, but not too much smoke to where you say this is only a barbecue sandwich. This is a cross between a barbecue sandwich and a French dip. Maybe that's the caramelized onion that comes through. Yeah, you get sweetness and smoky and salty. It's great. Guys, I have a brisket melt. It's just a whole combination. You can't put it down. And I love caramelized onions. And I'm a big cheese guy. Yeah. You've hit all your points. I've hit all my points. And the toast is great, too.
